nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Central configuration module defining ACTIVE_YEAR, filesystem paths (RAW_DIR, PROCESSED_DIR, DATABASE_DIR), year-stamped schema constants like ALLIANCE_COL, and analysis tuning knobs such as CLOSE_MARGIN_THRESHOLD.

nodes.name: data_io.py
nodes.summary: Canonical I/O layer exposing year-stamped filenames and load/save helpers for processed CSVs, outputs, and database tables; all paths derive from config.ACTIVE_YEAR.

nodes.name: seat_flip_report.py
nodes.summary: Compares actual election winners against zero-sum swing simulation winners per constituency and writes a seat-flip report with party-change flags.

nodes.name: state_swing_sensitivity.py
nodes.summary: Aggregates per-state swing sensitivity metrics—flip rates, close-seat counts, and margin statistics—by merging actual results with zero-sum simulation output.

nodes.name: clean_eci.py
nodes.summary: Year-agnostic ECI Excel cleaner using calamine engine: auto-detects header rows, normalises columns, computes rank/vote_share/margin, and routes files to canonical processed CSVs.

nodes.name: clean_eci_2019.py
nodes.summary: Legacy sibling of clean_eci targeting the same modern ECI format but keyed on ELECTION_YEAR; parses raw Excel into standardised candidate, party, and summary CSVs.

nodes.name: database_layer.py
nodes.summary: Builds year-stamped analytical database tables (results, candidate, party, alliance, constituency) from processed CSVs with stable constituency_id slugs for cross-year joins.

nodes.name: query_database.py
nodes.summary: Convenience query module over database tables: closest wins, fragmentation, seat counts, vulnerable seats, and alliance seat totals.

nodes.name: build_state_demographics_2011.py
nodes.summary: Placeholder Census 2011 demographics builder that audits uploaded files against the census manifest; parsing not yet implemented.

nodes.name: census_manifest.py
nodes.summary: Curated checklist of Census 2011 tables needed for electoral analysis, with helpers to derive expected filenames and locate uploaded files.

nodes.name: build_party_alliances.py
nodes.summary: Builds cross-year party-to-alliance lookup table from party_master and hardcoded PARTY_ALLIANCE_MAP for 2019 and 2024.

nodes.name: build_party_metadata.py
nodes.summary: Enriches contesting parties with type, ideology, region, and year-specific alliance tags; outputs party counts audit and full metadata CSV.

nodes.name: normalise_candidates.py
nodes.summary: Normalises candidate names and assigns stable candidate_election_id keys to results_table rows; maintains cross-year candidate_master roster.

nodes.name: normalise_parties.py
nodes.summary: Maps raw ECI party strings to canonical party_id via alias table; augments results_table and writes party_master.csv.

nodes.name: simple_swing_simulator.py
nodes.summary: Applies uniform per-party vote-share swings nationwide, re-ranks candidates, and outputs simulated winners (non-zero-sum model).

nodes.name: state_swing_simulator.py
nodes.summary: Applies (state, party) keyed swings to vote shares, re-ranks per constituency, and outputs state-level simulated winners (non-zero-sum).

nodes.name: zero_sum_state_swing_simulator.py
nodes.summary: Per-(state, party) swing simulator that clips negative shares and renormalises each constituency to 100%, producing rigorous flip comparisons for analysis modules.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Loads actual and simulated winners, merges on state/constituency, flags flipped seats, saves report, and prints summary statistics.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Computes per-state flip rates and close-seat counts using CLOSE_MARGIN_THRESHOLD, saves state swing sensitivity CSV.

nodes.name: clean_col
nodes.summary: Normalises Excel column headers to snake_case alphanumeric identifiers.

nodes.name: detect_header_row
nodes.summary: Scans raw sheet rows to find the first row matching header heuristics (non-null ratio, string cells, keyword match).

nodes.name: load_excel_file
nodes.summary: Reads an ECI Excel file with calamine engine, detects header row, and returns cleaned DataFrame.

nodes.name: remove_junk_rows
nodes.summary: Drops entirely empty rows from a DataFrame while preserving total/summary rows.

nodes.name: standardize_results
nodes.summary: Transforms candidate-level sheet into canonical long table with rank, vote_share, winner flag, and margin_votes.

nodes.name: standardize_party_file
nodes.summary: Cleans party reference sheet: strips whitespace on text columns and stamps ACTIVE_YEAR.

nodes.name: standardize_summary_file
nodes.summary: Basic cleaning for constituency summary sheet (placeholder for full multi-sheet loader).

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Iterates RAW_YEAR_DIR Excel files, routes each to appropriate standardiser, and saves via data_io.save_csv.

nodes.name: clean_col
nodes.summary: Normalises Excel column headers to snake_case alphanumeric identifiers.

nodes.name: detect_header_row
nodes.summary: Scans raw sheet rows to find the first row matching header heuristics.

nodes.name: load_excel_file
nodes.summary: Reads ECI Excel with calamine, auto-detects header, returns normalised DataFrame.

nodes.name: remove_junk_rows
nodes.summary: Drops entirely empty rows from a DataFrame.

nodes.name: standardize_results
nodes.summary: Builds canonical candidate results with rank, vote_share, winner, and margin_votes using ELECTION_YEAR.

nodes.name: standardize_party_file
nodes.summary: Cleans party sheet and stamps ELECTION_YEAR.

nodes.name: standardize_summary_file
nodes.summary: Basic cleaning for constituency summary sheet.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Processes all Excel files in RAW_YEAR_DIR and writes year-stamped processed CSVs.

nodes.name: load_candidate_results
nodes.summary: Reads the year-stamped ECI candidate results CSV from PROCESSED_DIR.

nodes.name: load_party_metadata
nodes.summary: Reads party metadata CSV with type, alliance, ideology, and region.

nodes.name: load_winners
nodes.summary: Reads one-row-per-constituency winners table enriched with party metadata.

nodes.name: load_constituency_features
nodes.summary: Reads constituency-level numeric features for modelling.

nodes.name: save_csv
nodes.summary: Writes DataFrame to processed/ or outputs/ directory based on outputs flag.

nodes.name: save_parquet
nodes.summary: Writes DataFrame as Parquet to processed/ or outputs/.

nodes.name: save_table
nodes.summary: Persists database table as both CSV and Parquet with ACTIVE_YEAR suffix.

nodes.name: load_table
nodes.summary: Loads a year-stamped database table from Parquet.

nodes.name: make_constituency_id
nodes.summary: Creates year-stable slug IDs like STATE__CONSTITUENCY for cross-year joins.

nodes.name: load_data
nodes.summary: Loads results, party metadata, winners, and constituency features via data_io.

nodes.name: build_results_table
nodes.summary: Builds long candidate-level fact table with election_year, election_type, and constituency_id.

nodes.name: build_party_table
nodes.summary: Extracts one row per party with metadata columns including year-stamped alliance.

nodes.name: build_constituency_table
nodes.summary: Combines constituency features with stable id and winner facts.

nodes.name: build_alliance_table
nodes.summary: Produces long-format (election_year, party, alliance) mapping.

nodes.name: build_candidate_table
nodes.summary: Creates lightweight candidate lookup keyed by candidate_id slug.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Loads data, builds all five database tables, and saves via save_table.

nodes.name: closest_wins
nodes.summary: Returns constituencies with smallest top-2 margin, optionally filtered by winning party.

nodes.name: most_fragmented
nodes.summary: Returns constituencies with highest effective number of parties.

nodes.name: seats_by_state_and_party
nodes.summary: Aggregates seat counts grouped by state and party from results_table.

nodes.name: vulnerable_seats
nodes.summary: Lists seats held by a party whose margin is below threshold.

nodes.name: alliance_seat_counts
nodes.summary: Counts seats by year-stamped alliance column from constituency_table.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Demo entry point printing sample queries for BJP closest wins, fragmentation, vulnerable INC seats, and alliance counts.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Audits CENSUS_2011_DIR against manifest entries, reports present/missing/extra files; parsing deferred.

nodes.name: expected_basename
nodes.summary: Returns preferred filename for a manifest entry given optional extension.

nodes.name: find_uploaded_file
nodes.summary: Locates uploaded Census file matching preferred basename or code prefix in raw directory.

nodes.name: tables_by_priority
nodes.summary: Filters CENSUS_2011_TABLES list by priority level or returns all.

nodes.name: load_party_master
nodes.summary: Reads party_master.csv from DATABASE_DIR or raises if missing.

nodes.name: build_party_alliance_table
nodes.summary: Expands PARTY_ALLIANCE_MAP into long (party_id, election_year, alliance) rows for all known parties.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Builds and saves party_alliance_by_year.csv with summary stats and UNKNOWN audit.

nodes.name: build_party_counts
nodes.summary: Counts candidates per party from results DataFrame.

nodes.name: build_party_metadata
nodes.summary: Merges PARTY_FACTS and PARTY_ALLIANCE_MAP onto party counts with unknown defaults.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Loads candidate results, builds counts and metadata tables, saves both CSVs.

nodes.name: clean_text
nodes.summary: Uppercases and normalises candidate name strings, stripping special characters.

nodes.name: slugify
nodes.summary: Converts cleaned text to underscore slug for ID components.

nodes.name: build_candidate_election_id
nodes.summary: Constructs stable CAND_<year>_<state>_<constituency>_<party>_<name> identifier.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Augments results_table with candidate IDs, updates candidate_master cross-year roster.

nodes.name: clean_text
nodes.summary: Uppercases and normalises raw party name strings.

nodes.name: slugify
nodes.summary: Converts cleaned party text to underscore slug.

nodes.name: normalise_party
nodes.summary: Maps raw party via KNOWN_PARTY_ALIASES or generates PARTY_ slug for unknowns.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Adds party_id columns to results_table and writes party_master.csv.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Applies SWINGS dict to vote_share, re-ranks per constituency, saves simulated winners CSV.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Applies STATE_SWINGS keyed by (state, party), re-ranks, saves state simulated winners.

nodes.name: apply_zero_sum_swing
nodes.summary: Within one constituency group, applies state-party swing, clips to zero, renormalises shares to 100%.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Runs zero-sum swing per constituency, saves full simulated results and winners, reports changed seats.
